title: Warmaster
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] rank|the [[Ubese/Legends|Ubese]] [[War-Master|title]]}}
The '''warmaster''' was the [[Commander-in-Chief/Legends|leader]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|army]] and [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|fleet]].

==Overview==
The warmaster was often addressed as the Fearsome One. All warmasters were remade in the image of [[Yun-Yammka]], the [[Yun'o|god]] of war. The warmasters were second only to the [[Supreme Overlord]].

==History==
[[File:TsavongLah-NEGTC.png|thumb|right|230px|Warmaster [[Tsavong Lah]]]]
The first warmaster was a [[vua'sa]] created by [[Yun-Yuuzhan]] instead of a [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warrior]] challenged and [[Death/Legends|killed]] the beast, and thus the title was carried on by Yuuzhan Vong warriors.

At the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the warmaster of the Yuuzhan Vong was [[Tsavong Lah]]. His father, [[Czulkang Lah]], had been warmaster before him. Most warmasters were killed in battle, but Tsavong Lah wrested the title from his father by right of combat, sparing the elder warrior's life out of familial attachment. Czulkang Lah went on to become one of the most respected teachers of warriors until falling in battle in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

When Tsavong Lah was [[Battle of Ebaq|killed]] by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] on [[Ebaq 9]], [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Nas Choka]] was [[Escalation|escalated]] as the next and final warmaster of the Yuuzhan Vong. He led his forces into battle against the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] in the decisive [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], though ultimately surrendered to the enemy after the [[Sekot accords|truce]] on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].
